name: Riley Gold Corp.
summary: Riley Gold Corp., a precious metals exploration company, engages in the acquisition and exploration of mineral properties in the United States. The company has an option agreement in the East Manhattan Wash property that comprises of 6 unpatented lode mining claims located in Nye County, Nevada. The company was formerly known as Riley Resources Corp. and changed its name to Riley Gold Corp. in October 2020. Riley Gold Corp. was incorporated in 2011 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
